mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_project_positions (project_id, name, headcount, pay_type, amount, sort_order) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{name}, #{headcount}, #{payType}, #{amount}, #{sortOrder})

INSERT INTO admin_project_positions (project_id, name, headcount, pay_type, amount, sort_order) VALUES
(#{item.projectId}, #{item.name}, #{item.headcount}, #{item.payType}, #{item.amount}, #{item.sortOrder})
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, name, headcount, pay_type, amount, sort_order, created_at FROM admin_project_positions WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
